title: 10 best herbal creams for constipation
description: Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, creams helps with constipation because it contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to improve blood flow to the intestines. This increased blood flow helps stimulate bowel movements and enhance the contractions of the intestinal muscles, allowing for more efficient movement of food through the digestive system.
